name: Apple Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the potatoes into bite-sized pieces and boil until tender but not soft.
2. Peel the apple and slice into bite-sized pieces (sprinkle with lemon juice until ready to use).
3. Chop the celery finely.
4. Cool the potatoes by draining and placing them in a pan of ice water.
5. Combine all ingredients and mix with dressing and dill if desired. Use Medford Farms Creamy Dill No-Oil Dressing.
6. Chill several hours before serving.
Quick and delicious!
